title: nephrodium cirrhosum
intro: Nephrodium cirrhosum, also known as the Button Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nephrodium cirrhosum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory issues, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the fronds of the plant are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed for their medicinal properties.
